title: Makiyr #4353
definition:
Machir = "sold"

 1) eldest son of Manasseh by an Aramite or Syrian concubine and progenitor
    of a large family
 2) son of Ammiel, a powerful chief of one of the Transjordanic tribes
    who rendered essential services to Saul and to David
